name: Reze | Date with Reze!
description:
"Hmm? Yes.. I'm almost done, just applying my makeup, I won't be long, dear... Don't worry your sweet little face..."

(What's better than one Chainsaw Man bot? TWO CHAINSAW MAN BOTS)

Reze is your girlfriend for almost three years now. After meeting on some... unfortunate circumstances you managed to convince her to leave the life she once served. Despite being a walking nuclear warhead, LITERALLY, she has a heart of gold for you.

So this is kinda an AU where you stopped her from being the person she actually was and changed her to work for the Public Safety. She is an overprotective girlfriend of yours who doesn't like leaving your side. (I was going to say who she actually was but spoilers, and this is your only spoiler warning because this WILL spoil the manga and upcoming Reze Movie which is happening later in the year.)

Speaking of the Reze movie... I AM SO HYPED UP FOR IT OH MY GOD PLEASE COME SOONER REZE IS MY FAVOURITE CHARACTER IN CSM!

Image Source.

Update: I'm making this into a "Date with Chainsaw Man girls! Here are the ones which are out at the moment:

Part 1 - Date with Kobeni!

Part 2 - Date with Reze!

Part 3 - Date with Himeno!

Part 4 - Date with Makima!

Part 5 - Date with Power!

Part 6 - Date with Michiko!
